achievements.title: Achievements & Titles
achievements.subtitle: Unlock achievements, earn AP points, and show off your title across the platform!
achievements.loadError: Failed to load. Please try again.
achievements.liveStats: Global unlock rates update in real time
achievements.titlesTabHint: Unlock achievements to earn titles. Equip one to show it beside your name everywhere.
achievements.unlockRequirementUnknown: Unlock by completing the linked achievement
achievements.titleWardrobeGuide: Titles are rewards for achievements. Complete an achievement to unlock its title, then tap Equip to show it in chat, comments, leaderboards, and more. Only one title can be equipped at a time.
achievements.loginRequired: Sign in to manage your title wardrobe
achievements.unlockRequirementSupporterBasic: 成為 $5 平台支持者即可獲得
achievements.unlockRequirementSupporterPremium: 成為 $10 熱心支持者即可獲得

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pageDesc: Tips, forum replies, and new games from creators you follow appear here.

seo.homeDescription: RainyNightFrog — free web games. Play, upload, and support creators with 0% platform fees.
seo.communityDescription: Browse platform discussions, post threads, and join game-specific forums.
seo.gameDescription: Play {title} on RainyNightFrog — free web games.
seo.creatorDescription: Browse {count} public games by {name} on RainyNightFrog.
seo.searchDescription: Search games, tags, and creators on RainyNightFrog.

feeds.title: Feed hub
feeds.description: Subscribe to new releases, forum activity, or category-specific RSS/Atom feeds.
feeds.categoriesDesc: Click a category to get an RSS feed of public releases in that genre.
feeds.hint: Paste feed URLs into Feedly, Inoreader, or any RSS reader.
feeds.previewApiHint: Developers can use the JSON preview API:

unsubscribe.forumDigestSuccess: Weekly forum digest emails are now off. You can re-enable them in settings.
unsubscribe.forumDigestAlready: You have already unsubscribed from the weekly forum digest.
unsubscribe.forumDigestInvalid: This link is invalid or expired. Manage notifications in settings.
unsubscribe.forumDigestMisconfigured: Unsubscribe is not configured yet. Turn off the digest in settings.

forumDigestEmail.subject: RainyNightFrog weekly forum digest
forumDigestEmail.title: RainyNightFrog forum digest
forumDigestEmail.periodLabel: Hot discussions from the past {days} days

leaderboard.title: Live Leaderboards
leaderboard.subtitle: RainyNightFrog platform rankings · refreshes every 10s
leaderboard.empty: No rankings yet — be the first on the board!
leaderboard.fetchError: Could not load leaderboards. Make sure the dev server is running, or ask an admin to run the database setup.
leaderboard.loggedInHint: Your online and play time are tracked automatically

common.backToGameMenuDone: Returned to the game menu — you can pick difficulty again
common.backToGameMenuFailed: Could not reach the game. Refresh the page and try again
common.creator: Creator
common.fullscreenHint: Press ESC or click outside to close
common.gameNotFound: Forum for this game not found
common.readGameFailed: Failed to load game, please try again later
common.reuploadRequired: This game needs to be re-uploaded
common.reuploadZipHint: Legacy zip format cannot be played directly in the browser. Please re-upload a zip containing index.html.
common.reuploadLegacy: This game uses a legacy zip format and cannot be auto-converted. Please re-upload
common.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here, or click to select
common.changeCoverHint: Click or drag to change cover
common.404Desc: The page you requested does not exist

home.tagFilterSelectedHint: {count} tag(s) selected · games must match all selected tags

announcements.label: Announcements
announcements.launch: RainyNightFrog is live! Thousands of browser games — zero downloads, play instantly
announcements.upload: Creator hub is open: upload a ZIP game and publish to the homepage in one click
announcements.community: Join the community forum to share tips, devlogs, and game strategies
announcements.feeds: Subscribe via RSS / Atom and never miss new releases or forum updates
announcements.featured: Platform star games are trending: VOID GACHA · CoreDefense · CyberFortune
announcements.multilingual: 11 interface languages supported — switch anytime from the top-right menu
announcements.leaderboard: Climb the favorites and playtime leaderboards to unlock exclusive titles
announcements.achievements: Complete achievements and collect titles to showcase on your profile
announcements.forumRules: Read the community rules before posting — help keep discussions friendly
announcements.followCreators: Follow your favorite creators to get notified when they release new games
announcements.zeroDownload: Pure browser gaming: no downloads, play instantly on any device
announcements.starGames: Platform stars are trending: VOID GACHA · CoreDefense · CyberFortune

home.heroDesc1: Thousands of browser games, zero downloads, zero waiting. Creators can easily upload their work, players can enjoy without limits.
home.heroDesc2: This is your gateway to the esports universe!
home.gridDescAll: Sorted by "{sort}" · Community creations from Supabase
home.emptyHintAll: Be the first creator to upload a game!
home.emptyHintCategory: Try another category, or upload a game in this genre.
home.emptyTags: No games match the selected tags
home.emptyHintTags: Try fewer tags or clear the filter.
home.emptyHintPrice: Try another price range or clear the filter.
home.featuredDesc: VOID GACHA · CoreDefense · CyberFortune — Stunning design × Hardcore experience
home.favoritesSectionDesc: Jump back to games you love
home.followingFeedDesc: Latest releases from creators you follow

game.gameFeedSubscribeHint: Subscribe to devlogs and forum posts for this game
game.startPlayHint: Click the game area to start playing
game.draftPreviewBanner: 🛠️ Draft preview — creator-only, not listed on the homepage yet
game.partnerPreviewBanner: 🎬 Partner preview — you're accessing a draft game via access code
game.noComments: No comments yet — be the first to share your thoughts!
game.commentFailed: Failed to post comment. Please try again.
game.forumHint: You can also start a full thread in the community forum
game.tipSupportDesc: Tips are voluntary and never required to play. Thank you for your support!
game.tipSpendingHint: Please tip responsibly and only spend what you can afford.
game.tipAmountInvalid: Amount must be between ${min} and ${max} USD
game.tipVoluntaryNote: Tips are voluntary support, not a purchase of the game.
game.tipPreviewModalNote: Payments aren't live yet — preview only, no real charge. A test tip record will be saved.
game.tipSuccessPreview: Thank you! (Preview mode — no real charge)
game.tipCreatorPayoutNotReady: The creator has not finished Stripe payout setup. Tips are unavailable for now. Creators: go to Settings → Payout to connect Stripe.
game.leaveConfirmDescription: Your game is in progress. Unsaved progress may be lost.
game.tipReceiptNoBilling: No billing address yet. Go to
game.tipBillingHint: Set a billing address to show on receipts
game.tipShowNameOnWallLabel: Show my name on the supporter wall
game.tipShowNameOnWallDesc: Every tip appears on the supporter wall. Uncheck to show as "Anonymous supporter".
game.tipAnonymousDesc: When checked, your name is hidden on the public supporter wall (creators still see transaction records).
game.supporterWallDesc: Every tipper is listed here. You can choose whether to show your name.
game.supporterWallEmpty: No tips yet — be the first supporter!
game.tipPaymentMethodsDesc: Save a card here for faster checkout when you tip.
game.tipPaymentMethodsLogin: Sign in to save cards and tip faster.
game.tipPaymentMethodsLoginButton: Sign in to add a card
game.checkoutPlatformTipDesc: 可選擇額外給予平台小費，感謝我們維護與營運服務。
game.checkoutPreviewNote: 金流尚未上線：此為預覽，不會產生真實扣款，但會記錄測試訂單。
game.checkoutCreatorNotReady: 創作者尚未完成 Stripe 收款設定，暫時無法購買。
game.checkoutSuccessPreview: 訂單已建立（預覽模式，無真實扣款）
game.checkoutPlatformTipInvalid: 平台小費須為 0 至 ${max} USD 之間
game.purchaseRequiredDesc: 此為付費遊戲，完成結帳後即可在此直接遊玩與下載。

dashboard.deleteGameDesc: You are about to permanently delete "{title}".
dashboard.deleteGameWarning: ⚠️ This cannot be undone. Game files, cover, forum posts, and stats will all be removed.
dashboard.revenueLiveDataNote: Real tip records below show net revenue after payment processor fees. Platform fee is currently 0%.
dashboard.revenuePreviewTipsNote: {count} tip(s) are preview-mode (Stripe not live) and have not settled.
dashboard.revenueSectionDesc: Track tip count, average amount, conversion rate, and per-game breakdown. Cards show lifetime or last-7-day values; change compares week over week.
dashboard.revenueChartDesc: Tip count and revenue over the past {days} days
dashboard.revenueBreakdownDesc: Full breakdown sorted by tip revenue
dashboard.revenueGameSummaryDesc: Lifetime tip performance for the selected game
dashboard.revenueEmptyDesc: This game has not enabled pay-what-you-want tips. Enable them in edit to see revenue here.
dashboard.chartDescSingle: Traffic and conversion trends for "{title}" over the past 14 days
dashboard.noGamesYet: No games uploaded yet. Use the button above to publish your first title.
dashboard.analyticsLiveDataNote: Real traffic and play data below (last 30 days).
dashboard.welcomeDescLive: Track performance, analyze trends, and manage your games. Data below comes from real analytics_events.
dashboard.welcomeDescGameLive: Real traffic and play data for this game.
dashboard.partnerAccessDesc: Generate links so media and streamers can play draft builds before public launch.
dashboard.chartDesc: Traffic and conversion trends over the past 14 days
dashboard.highlightsDesc: Quick overview of key growth metrics for {period}
dashboard.gamesListDesc: View all your uploaded works and their current status
dashboard.publishMonetizationDesc: Optionally enable tips and set a suggested amount.
dashboard.gamePricingDesc: Choose how players access your game.
dashboard.pricingTypeFreeDesc: Anyone can play at no cost.
dashboard.pricingTypePwywDesc: Players choose how much to pay (with a minimum).
dashboard.pricingFixedAmountHint: Amount in {currency}. Stored in cents on the server.
dashboard.pricingMinAmountHint: Minimum in {currency}. Use 0 to allow any amount.
dashboard.pricingOnSaleDesc: Mark this game as on sale so it appears in the homepage sale filter.
dashboard.pricingOnSaleHint: Turn this on for promotions or limited-time discounts.
dashboard.publishStatusSectionDesc: Choose draft or public before saving.
dashboard.publishStatusDraftDesc: Only you can see it — ideal for private testing.
dashboard.publishStatusPublicDesc: Visible to all players on the homepage.
dashboard.tipsEnabledDesc: Pay-what-you-want: players choose whether and how much to tip.
dashboard.suggestedTipAmountHint: Minimum $1 USD — for reference only; players choose the actual amount.
dashboard.tipsFeeDisclosureIntro: All fees apply per individual tip, not as a lump sum on monthly totals. This is a preview — no real charges yet.
dashboard.tipsFeeDisclosureIntroLive: All fees apply per individual tip, not as a lump sum on monthly totals. Real charges are processed by Stripe; net amounts below reflect processor fees.
dashboard.tipsFeePerTransactionDesc: Each tip is a separate transaction. Payment processor fees apply per tip. Platform fee is currently 0%.
dashboard.tipsFeePlatformDesc: RainyNightFrog plans to charge {percent}% per tip to run servers and develop features. Rate may change before launch.
dashboard.tipsFeePlatformDescZero: To support early creators, RainyNightFrog currently charges no platform fee. When you first enable tips, 0% is locked for that game. Future site-wide increases won't affect games already locked at 0%.
dashboard.tipsFeeChangePolicyTitle: If we change the platform fee later
dashboard.tipsFeeChangePolicyDesc: We may adjust the site-wide fee (reference: {futurePercent}%). Changes will be announced at least {days} days in advance and apply only to new transactions after the effective date — never retroactively to settled or withdrawn tips.
dashboard.tipsFeeGrandfatherDesc: Games that enable tips before payments launch lock in 0% permanently. Creators who join after a future increase use the then-current site-wide rate.
dashboard.tipsFeePaymentDesc: Charged by Stripe/PayPal, typically ~{percent}% + ${fixed} USD, separate from the platform fee.
dashboard.tipsFeeCreatorNetFormula: Net ≈ tip amount − platform fee − payment fee
dashboard.tipsFeeCreatorNetFormulaZero: Net ≈ tip amount − payment fee (no platform fee currently)
dashboard.tipsFeePlayerBriefDesc: Tips are voluntary — games remain fully playable without paying. The exact amount is shown before checkout. Tips support creators; they are not product purchases.
dashboard.tipsFeeSettlementDesc: Tips accumulate in your creator balance and are paid out in batches once a threshold is met (schedule announced at launch).
dashboard.platformFeeLockedTitle: Platform fee locked for this game
dashboard.platformFeeLockedDesc: Locked when tips were first enabled. Future site-wide changes won't affect this game.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticeDesc: Players sign in on RainyNightFrog with Google, Discord, GitHub, Twitch, Email, or a magic link. Your game does not need its own OAuth or account system.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint1: Login happens on the outer game page (not inside the iframe), so Google sign-in works reliably.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint2: The RainyNightFrog SDK is auto-injected in the iframe for player identity and cloud saves.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint3: For saves, call RainyNightFrog.loadSave() / saveSave() in your game — do not wire third-party OAuth yourself.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint4: Guests can play without login; use loadSaveMerged() after sign-in to merge local and cloud progress.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint5: Legacy players: create import codes on the edit page; call importLegacySave(code) in your game.
dashboard.legacyImportDesc: Create one-time codes for players coming from another site or old login. After signing in on RainyNightFrog, they redeem the code in your game to import progress.
dashboard.legacyImportCreatedTitle: Share these codes with players (shown once)
dashboard.legacyImportUsageStep1: Paste the player's save JSON from your old platform (use the sample format to test)
dashboard.legacyImportUsageStep2: Click Generate, then copy the NP-XXXX-XXXX code for the player (shown once)
dashboard.legacyImportUsageStep3: Player signs in on RainyNightFrog and opens your game, then enters the code in-game
dashboard.legacyImportUsageStep4: Call RainyNightFrog.importLegacySave(code) in your game; progress is written to cloud save
dashboard.publishStatusNote: Drafts are creator-only previews. Switch to Public to appear on the homepage.
dashboard.alertSuggestedTip: Please enter a suggested tip amount
dashboard.alertSuggestedTipMin: Suggested tip amount must be at least $1
dashboard.alertStripeConnect: Connect Stripe to receive payments before publishing a paid game
dashboard.stripeConnectDesc: Connect with Stripe to receive payments directly when players purchase your games.
dashboard.stripeConnectPendingDesc: Stripe onboarding is in progress. Complete setup to publish paid games.
dashboard.stripeConnectButton: Connect with Stripe to receive payments
dashboard.stripeConnectPreviewMode: Stripe is in preview mode — connect is unavailable until payments go live
dashboard.uploadDesc: Fill in game details and upload files. Save as draft for testing or go public immediately.
dashboard.editDesc: Edit basic info, change cover, or upload a new zip to publish a new version. All files are scanned for zip bombs and path traversal.
dashboard.orphanGameHint: "{title}" is not linked to a creator account yet (common with legacy uploads). Saving will automatically link it to your account.
dashboard.screenshotGalleryHint: Up to 8 images to showcase gameplay (PNG / JPG / WebP)
dashboard.devlogPublishHint: When publishing a new version, add a devlog entry with optional images
dashboard.gameSlugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Used for your dedicated subdomain when published.
dashboard.gameSlugPreviewNote: Opens your game page automatically. Use Copy URL — do not select the note text with the link.
dashboard.gameDescPlaceholder: Describe gameplay, features, and target audience...
dashboard.zipHint: Supports .zip with index.html at the root. On production, keep each upload under ~{productionSize} (upload zip and cover separately).
dashboard.submitReviewNote: After submission, your game enters the review process. Results will be sent to your creator account.
dashboard.versionLiveDesc: New version of "{title}" is now live
dashboard.infoUpdatedDesc: Basic info for "{title}" has been updated
dashboard.missingZipDesc: Publishing a new version requires uploading a new .zip game package
dashboard.alertSlug: Please set a valid project URL (slug)
dashboard.alertAiDisclosure: Please indicate whether this project includes AI-generated content
dashboard.alertAiContentTypes: Select at least one AI content type when AI-generated content is included
dashboard.publishRequiredPublicDesc: Title, description, genre, cover, game file, and AI disclosure (plus tip amount if tips are enabled). Tags and long description can be added later.
dashboard.publishRequiredDraftDesc: Only game title and game file are required. Other fields can be filled in later.
dashboard.alertZip: Please upload a game zip file
dashboard.tipsFeePlatformCompareDesc: Some platforms let creators choose their revenue share (0–100%); payment processor fees are separate. RainyNightFrog is 0% during early access; a future site-wide rate (reference {futurePercent}%) would be announced in advance. Games locked at 0% stay at 0%.
dashboard.genreCoreDesc: Choose the primary type that best represents your game (single choice)
dashboard.tagsSubDesc: Select keyword tags below to help players search (optional, up to {max})
dashboard.viewportDesc: Set the embed player iframe dimensions. Default {width}×{height} px
dashboard.viewportFullscreen: Show fullscreen button — displays a fullscreen toggle at the bottom-right of the embed
dashboard.aiDisclosureDesc: Does this project include AI-generated content (art, code, or voice)? Please declare accurately even if manually edited.
dashboard.aiDisclosureYes: Yes — this project includes generative AI output
dashboard.aiDisclosureNo: No — this project does not include generative AI output
dashboard.aiContentTypesPrompt: Which AI-generated content is used? (required, select all that apply)
dashboard.richTextDesc: Supports rich text, links, code blocks, and emoji

auth.callbackFailed: Login verification failed, please try again
auth.creatorHint: Creator Dashboard is only available to Creator accounts. Please sign in with a creator account, or choose Creator when registering.
auth.adminHint: This account does not have super admin access. If Google sign-in succeeded but you returned here, the signed-in email has not been granted admin. Ask the platform owner to run npm run db:assign-admin, or sign in with an authorized admin account.
auth.registerSuccess: Registration successful! If email verification is enabled, please check your inbox and click the link before signing in.
auth.operationFailed: Operation failed, please try again later
auth.heroDesc: Players can favorite and play community games; creator accounts get access to the dashboard to upload zip games and publish to the homepage with one click.
auth.loginDesc: Enter your email and password to start playing
auth.registerDesc: Choose Player or Creator to join the platform
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox—we sent you a sign-in link.
auth.loginMagicDesc: Enter your email and we'll send a password-free sign-in link
auth.registerMagicDesc: Fill in your details and we'll email you a link to finish registration
auth.magicLinkHint: No password needed. Open the link in your email to continue—the link expires after a while.

chooseRole.title: Choose your account type
chooseRole.description: Choose player or creator on your first visit. Later sign-ins go straight in. You can change this anytime in your profile.
chooseRole.cardTitle: How will you use RainyNightFrog today?
chooseRole.cardDesc: This controls access to the creator dashboard and uploads.
chooseRole.playerDesc: Play community games, join discussions, and save favorites.
chooseRole.creatorDesc: Open the creator dashboard to upload and manage your games.
chooseRole.footnote: Super admins skip this step automatically.

auth.mfaChallengeDesc: This account has 2FA enabled. Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetEmailSent: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter and confirm your new password
auth.resetSessionRequired: Reset link expired or not verified. Please request a new reset email.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your public profile, account info, and platform identity—your public info is shown across the forum and site
profile.avatarHint: Click avatar to upload · PNG / JPG / WebP · Max 2 MB
profile.displayNamePlaceholder: Nickname shown on forum and site
profile.creatorUsernameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Enables your dedicated subdomain.
profile.creatorUsernamePreviewNote: Opens your creator page automatically. Use Copy URL — do not select the note text with the link.
profile.emailHint: Email used at registration. Contact platform admin to change it.
profile.playingGamesDesc: Browse and play games as a player
profile.developingGamesDesc: Check to unlock creator dashboard and upload permissions
profile.saveFailed: Save failed, please try again later
profile.equippedTitleHint: This title appears across chat, forums, leaderboards, and the rest of the site
profile.regionHint: Detected from your IP address and shown on your player profile card
profile.playerIdHint: A unique number assigned at registration. Provide this ID when contacting support.
profile.settingsHint: For appearance, notifications, and system preferences, go to
profile.showcaseTagsStatsNote: This only controls the small tags under your name. Achievement and forum counts in the stat grid cannot be hidden yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Adjust appearance, notifications, game experience, and accessibility—changes are saved locally immediately
settings.compactLayoutDesc: Reduce card spacing to show more content on the same screen
settings.languageNote: Use the globe icon in the top-right navbar to switch site language. Your choice is remembered.
settings.forumReplyEmailDesc: Get an email when someone replies to your post or comment
settings.forumReplyInAppDesc: Show forum replies in the notification center (independent of email)
settings.forumDigestDesc: Receive email digests of hot discussions for games you follow
settings.followNewGameEmailDesc: Email when a creator you follow publishes an approved game
settings.followNewGameInAppDesc: Show new releases in notifications and the home following feed badge
settings.pushNotifyDesc: Deliver in-app notification events to your browser
settings.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support Web Push.
settings.pushNotConfigured: Push is not configured yet (VAPID keys required).
settings.pushPermissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Allow it in browser settings.
settings.pushEnableFailed: Could not enable push. Try again later.
settings.pushDisableFailed: Could not disable push. Try again later.
settings.forumDigestPreviewEmpty: No new discussions on public games this week.
settings.pushNotifyForumDesc: Notify when someone replies to your posts or comments
settings.pushNotifyFollowDesc: Notify when creators you follow publish new games
settings.gameAutoplayDesc: Start loading immediately when entering a game page, no need to press start
settings.matureContentDesc: Show games marked as mature in browse and recommendations
settings.reduceMotionDesc: Reduce page animations and transitions to ease motion sickness
settings.resetDesc: Restore all system settings to RainyNightFrog defaults
settings.profileHint: For avatar, nickname, and account permissions, go to
settings.supportEmailDesc: Players can contact you about your games via this address.

accountSettings.securityDesc: Manage your password and sign-in security
accountSettings.oauthPasswordHint: You sign in with a third-party provider (Google, Discord, etc.) and have no password yet. Send a reset email to set one.
accountSettings.forgotPasswordHint: Forgot your password? We'll email you a reset link.
accountSettings.privacyDesc: Control who can see your profile and activity
accountSettings.profilePublicDesc: Allow other players to view your profile page
accountSettings.leaderboardVisibleDesc: Display your name on site-wide leaderboards
accountSettings.showcaseTagsDesc: Choose up to 4 tags shown under your name on player cards. Uncheck a tag to hide it. Tags without data (e.g. not ranked) are skipped automatically.
accountSettings.showcaseTagsMaxHint: Select up to {max} tags and adjust their display order.
accountSettings.showcaseTagDesc_online_rank: Your rank on the site-wide online time leaderboard
accountSettings.showcaseTagDesc_play_time_rank: Your rank on the site-wide play time leaderboard
accountSettings.showcaseTagDesc_donated_rank: Your rank on the site-wide tips/contribution leaderboard
accountSettings.showcaseTagDesc_creator: Marks you as a platform creator
accountSettings.showcaseTagDesc_supporter: Marks you as a platform supporter
accountSettings.creatorDesc: Support contact and platform fee policy
accountSettings.supportEmailDesc: Players can contact you about your games via this address.
accountSettings.tipNotifyDesc: Email and in-app tip alerts can be toggled independently. Dashboard unread tip badge is unchanged.
accountSettings.tipNotifyHint: You can still view earnings in the creator dashboard when disabled.
accountSettings.tipNotifyInAppHint: When off, tips won't appear in the notification center.
accountSettings.tipNotifyPushHint: Enable browser push in General settings first; alerts when you receive tips.
accountSettings.tipNotifySaveFailed: Failed to update tip notification settings
accountSettings.platformFeePolicy: If the site-wide rate later changes (reference {futurePercent}%), we will announce at least {days} days in advance. Games lock in the rate when tips are first enabled.
accountSettings.platformFeePerGameNote: Per-game locked rates appear on the edit page. See
accountSettings.platformFeeLockedGamesEmpty: No games have tips enabled with a locked fee yet.
accountSettings.billingDesc: Used for tip receipts, invoices, or tax purposes.
accountSettings.billingSectionDesc: Used only for RainyNightFrog receipts and compliance. Not shown publicly.
accountSettings.billingNamePlaceholder: As on ID or company registration
accountSettings.apiKeysDesc: Programmatic access to creator APIs (upload, analytics, etc.).
accountSettings.apiKeysSectionDesc: The full secret is shown once at creation. Store it securely; never commit to git.
accountSettings.apiKeysCreatedDesc: Copy and store it now. You won't see the full secret again.
accountSettings.apiKeysUsageHint: Request header: Authorization: Bearer np_live_… or X-Api-Key: np_live_…
accountSettings.apiKeysEndpointsDesc: Read-only access: games list, analytics, revenue. Write/upload APIs coming later.
accountSettings.dataDesc: Export your data or permanently delete your account
accountSettings.exportDesc: Download a JSON export of your account, games summary, and cloud save records.
accountSettings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and personal data. This cannot be undone.
accountSettings.deleteWarning: If you still have uploaded games, delete them from the creator dashboard first.
accountSettings.paymentPreviewDesc: Saved cards speed up checkout. This page is a preview until payments launch — no real charges.
accountSettings.paymentCardsDesc: After Stripe is enabled, manage saved cards here. You'll still confirm the amount before checkout.
accountSettings.payoutDesc: Connect Stripe to receive tip revenue (marketplace model)
accountSettings.payoutPreviewDesc: Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PAYMENTS_LIVE=true for live Stripe. Preview mode supports simulated withdrawals.
accountSettings.payoutFlowStep1: Player tips → collected by platform via Stripe
accountSettings.payoutFlowStep2: Payment fees deducted; platform fee is currently 0%
accountSettings.payoutFlowStep3: Request withdrawal to your linked bank once threshold is met
accountSettings.payoutEligible: Threshold met — you can request a withdrawal
accountSettings.payoutWithdrawSuccess: Withdrawal submitted — funds will reach your bank
accountSettings.payoutStripeDesc: Complete identity verification and bank linking via Stripe Express. Tax forms (e.g. W-8BEN) handled by Stripe.
accountSettings.payoutRestrictedHint: Stripe account restricted — complete pending requirements in Stripe.
accountSettings.payoutTaxNote: See tax and compliance details in
accountSettings.payoutPreviewMode: Stripe not configured — preview mode only
accountSettings.twoFactorDesc: Recommended for creator accounts with earnings
accountSettings.favoritesDesc: Games you saved for quick access.
accountSettings.followingDesc: Creators you follow — jump to their pages and new releases.
accountSettings.paymentTipsDesc: Games you supported and amounts. Download receipts for your records.
accountSettings.twoFactorScanHint: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator or another TOTP app, then enter the 6-digit code.
accountSettings.twoFactorActiveHint: Two-factor authentication is enabled on your account.

community.forumDesc: Browse site-wide discussions, post articles and comments, or visit game-specific forums.

forum.title: Community Forum
forum.hubDesc: Browse site-wide discussions, choose a game to post, or share guides and bug reports
forum.gameDesc: Player discussion, bug reports, and guides for "{title}"
forum.gameDescDefault: Player discussion, bug reports, and guides for this game
forum.loginToPost: · Sign in to post and comment
forum.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to reply!
forum.seedReplyPlaceholder: Reply to convert this demo thread into a real discussion…
forum.loginToDiscuss: Sign in to join the discussion
forum.titlePlaceholder: e.g. How do I beat level 3?
forum.contentPlaceholder: Describe your question, suggestion, or guide… (Ctrl+Enter to post)
forum.loginPromptTitle: Sign in to post and comment
forum.loginPromptDesc: Join discussions, report bugs, or share guides
forum.searchHintIdle: Search by title, author, category, game, or content
forum.searchHintTyping: Pick a suggestion below or keep typing to filter threads
forum.searchHintNoSuggestions: No matching suggestions — the list still filters as you type
forum.searchNoResultsHint: Try different keywords or clear filters
forum.beFirst: Be the first to create a post!
forum.connectionFailed: Cannot connect to forum. Please refresh the page.
forum.loginRequiredPost: Please sign in to create a post
forum.selectGamePost: Please select a game to post in
forum.contentTooLong: Post content is too long. Please shorten it before publishing.
forum.loginRequiredReply: Please sign in to join the discussion

forum.seedPlayerProfile: This is a demo account — player profile is unavailable.

rules.title: Community Rules
rules.metaDesc: RainyNightFrog community forum guidelines, moderator responsibilities, and reporting process
rules.intro: These rules apply to all community spaces on RainyNightFrog, including game forums, post comments, and reviews. Moderators of individual game forums may set additional rules. Violations may result in content removal; repeat or serious offenders may be suspended or permanently banned.
rules.footnote: This is a living document that will be updated as the community evolves. Major changes will be announced on the platform or on this page.
rules.disclaimerP1: RainyNightFrog is not responsible for user-generated content or the conduct of community members and moderators. We strive to maintain a safe, positive gaming community. If you see inappropriate content, please report it or contact us.
rules.disclaimerP2: The platform reserves the right to update, interpret, and enforce these rules at any time to maintain community health.
rules.rule1Title: No abuse, provocation, spam, or other disruptive behavior
rules.rule1Body: Any behavior that disrupts normal discussion is not allowed, such as repeating single words or meaningless content, excessive caps, flooding, or posting too many links. Violating content may be removed and accounts may be suspended.
rules.rule2Title: Do not post content on sensitive topics that may cause controversy
rules.rule2Body: We respect free speech, but please be mindful of others. Avoid posting extreme views on religion, race, gender, politics, or other groups in forums to prevent unnecessary conflict.
rules.rule3Title: Harassment of any kind will not be tolerated, whether the target is a member or not
rules.rule3Body: This includes inflammatory speech, threats, insults, or personal attacks. Do not publicly share others' real names, emails, photos, phone numbers, or addresses (doxxing).
rules.rule4Title: Do not impersonate any user, moderator, or administrator
rules.rule4Body: You may help answer questions, but you must not claim "official" authority, spread false announcements, or mislead other players in any way.
rules.rule5Title: Do not post unsolicited or mass advertising/promotional messages
rules.rule5Body: Forums are not for self-promotion unless a space explicitly allows it. On-topic, substantive sharing is preferred over obvious ads; excessive self-promotion may lead to suspension.
rules.rule6Title: Do not violate platform terms of use
rules.rule6Body: Including but not limited to: illegal content, malware links, unauthorized works of others, pornographic or excessively violent content, and any behavior that may harm players or platform security.
rules.moderatorsP1: "Community moderators" refers to the RainyNightFrog team or users authorized to manage content in specific forums. Game creators have primary responsibility for their game forums and may set supplementary rules consistent with platform policies.
rules.moderatorsP2: All moderators are subject to the same rules as regular members. If you believe a moderator is abusing their power, please report it or contact us.
rules.moderatorsP3: Moderators are responsible for maintaining forum order and may take action they deem appropriate within the rules (e.g. delete posts, warn, or request platform intervention).
rules.moderatorsP4: If you disagree with a moderator's decision, please communicate politely in private first; if unresolved, appeal to the RainyNightFrog team.
rules.reportingP1: If you see content in a forum that makes you uncomfortable, use the "Report" button next to the post or comment. Moderators and the platform team will review as soon as possible.
rules.reportingP2: For urgent situations or safety concerns, contact the RainyNightFrog team directly with links, screenshots, and timestamps when possible.
rules.reportingP3: If you are a forum moderator and find violating content, you may delete the relevant posts or comments; request a platform ban for the user if necessary.

void-gacha.description: Step into the void abyss and weave fate with mysterious virtual cards. In a gacha universe where neon meets the void, collect rare cards, build core decks, and challenge the endless depths.

core-defense.description: Build your heavy-industry mining empire and raise a steel defense line! Use precision conveyor belts and fully automated factory supply chains to hold back endless waves of alien machines. When the core goes critical, only steel and auto-turrets can win you dignity.

cyber-fortune.description: A mind game blending future big-data statistics and gambling strategy. In a neon cyber night city, use the unique 012 matrix and full-meal duel tactics to predict your opponent's next move. In a world of probability, you are the only king.

legal.metaDesc: RainyNightFrog Terms of Service, Payments & Tips Policy, and Disclaimer
legal.title: Legal & Policies
legal.intro: By using RainyNightFrog you acknowledge these policies. We aim to operate transparently so creators and players can participate with confidence.
legal.draftNotice: This page summarizes platform policies. No real charges occur until payments launch. Site-wide platform fee is currently 0% (early creator promotion).
legal.footerNote: This page is not legal advice. Consult a qualified attorney if you have questions.
legal.termsP1: RainyNightFrog provides web game publishing, play, and community features. You must meet the minimum age in your jurisdiction, or have guardian consent, to use paid or tipping features.
legal.termsP2: Creators are responsible for uploaded games, descriptions, and assets, including accurate AI disclosure. Illegal, infringing, malicious, or misleading content is prohibited.
legal.termsP3: We may review, unpublish, or remove content that violates community rules or law, and suspend or terminate accounts.
legal.termsP4: We may update these terms; continued use constitutes acceptance of the revised version.
legal.paymentsP1: RainyNightFrog tips are voluntary support, not a purchase of games or digital goods. Games remain fully playable without tipping.
legal.paymentsP2: Site-wide platform fee is currently {percent}% (early creator promotion). When you first enable tips, that rate locks for your game. If the site-wide rate later increases (reference: {futurePercent}%), games already locked at 0% are unaffected.
legal.paymentsP3: Payment processor fees (Stripe/PayPal, typically ~{percent}% + ${fixed} USD per tip) are separate from the platform fee.
legal.paymentsP4: Estimated creator net ≈ tip − platform fee (currently 0%) − processor fee. Funds are processed through the platform and accumulate until batch payout.
legal.paymentsP5: Tips are generally non-refundable support payments; any refund policy after launch will be posted here.
legal.paymentsP6: Payments are not live yet — enabling tips does not create real transactions today.
legal.paymentsP6Live: Tips are processed by Stripe. Sandbox/test mode does not charge real money; live keys create real charges. You cannot tip your own games.
legal.paymentsP7: We may adjust the site-wide platform fee. Any change will be announced at least {days} days in advance and applies only to new transactions after the effective date — never retroactively to settled or withdrawn amounts.
legal.paymentsP8: RainyNightFrog routes voluntary tips to creators via Stripe Connect marketplace. The platform currently charges 0% service fee. This is not tax or legal advice.
legal.paymentsP9: Creators are responsible for their own tax obligations. Tips are voluntary support, not purchases of games or digital goods. Disputes and refunds follow Stripe and platform policy.
legal.paymentsLiveNotice: Payments are enabled. Test keys use Stripe sandbox; live keys create real charges.
legal.disclaimerP1: RainyNightFrog is not fully liable for user-uploaded games, creator statements, or interactions between users. Games are provided by creators; we provide hosting and discovery.
legal.disclaimerP2: The service is provided "as is" without guarantees of uninterrupted or error-free operation. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for losses from network issues, third-party services, or force majeure.
legal.disclaimerP3: Tax reporting and compliance with local laws (consumer protection, AML, etc.) are the responsibility of creators and payers; seek professional advice when needed.
legal.privacyP1: RainyNightFrog collects account data (email, display name), uploaded game content, play and analytics events, and tip/payout records to operate the platform.
legal.privacyP2: Billing addresses are used for receipts and compliance; payment card data is processed by Stripe and full card numbers are not stored on our servers.
legal.privacyP3: You can export personal data or delete your account under Data & account. Exports include tip receipts and transaction history.
legal.privacyP4: We may use cookies and analytics to improve the service; if Google Analytics is enabled, you can limit tracking in your browser settings.

about.metaDesc: Learn about RainyNightFrog, how to join us, and how to contact us for submissions and partnerships.
about.title: About Us
about.intro: RainyNightFrog is a free web game platform where creators publish games and players jump in instantly. We are building an open, transparent community with 0% platform fees for early creators.
about.joinP1: We welcome creators, players, and partners who love games. Upload your browser games, join community discussions, support creators you enjoy, and help grow this zero-platform-fee universe.
about.joinP2: Want to publish? Sign up and upload from the creator dashboard. We are also open to collaborators passionate about platform operations, community, and engineering.
about.contactP1: For game submissions, platform partnerships, business inquiries, or suggestions, email us at:
about.footerJoin: RainyNightFrog welcomes creators and players to publish, play, and support web games together.

supporter.metaDesc: 成為 RainyNightFrog 平台支持者，獲得專屬勳章、名稱特效，並支持獨立遊戲開發者生態。
supporter.heroDesc: 你的支持直接幫助我們維護平台、改進功能，並讓更多獨立開發者被看見。
supporter.perk1Desc: 個人資料、留言與選單旁顯示專屬「支持者勳章」，讓社群一眼認出你的支持。
supporter.perk2Desc: 使用者名稱套用漸層高亮特效，在討論區與個人頁面更醒目。
supporter.perk3Desc: 收益用於伺服器、金流與創作者工具，讓更多獨立遊戲能免費上架與成長。
supporter.tiersDesc: 月費或年費訂閱，全數支持平台營運（非創作者分帳）。
supporter.tier10Monthly: 熱心支持者月費 · $10 / 月
supporter.tier10Yearly: 熱心支持者年費 · $100 / 年
supporter.spendingHint: 請適度課金、量力而為，依自身狀況理性消費。
supporter.previewNote: 金流尚未上線：此為預覽，不會產生真實扣款，但會授予測試支持者身分。
supporter.successLive: 感謝成為平台支持者！勳章已啟用。
supporter.successPreview: 支持者身分已啟用（預覽模式，無真實扣款）

creatorTools.devlogLaunchBody:
🎉 The game is live!

Thanks for waiting. This release includes core gameplay and a short tutorial.

Feedback is welcome!
creatorTools.devlogMajorUpdateBody:
🚀 Major update

- New levels / modes
- Balance tweaks
- Bug fixes

Thanks for your support!
creatorTools.devlogSaleBody:
💰 Limited-time sale

Discount active for a limited period. Price returns afterward.
creatorTools.devlogBugfixBody:
🔧 Bugfix update

- Fixed gameplay issues
- Minor load improvements

Please report anything unusual.
creatorTools.devlogMilestoneBody:
🏆 Milestone reached!

Thank you for the support. More content is coming soon.
